title: Blackberry Tangy Treat
description: A salty and crunchy blackcurrant jam treat with a touch of nostalgia, perfect for breakfast or as a snack.
instructions: Combine blackcurrant jam in a small saucepan over medium heat.
Add vegetable oil and stir until evenly distributed.
Sprinkle crispy sesame seeds into the mixture and mix well to coat the seeds.
Stir in coarse sea salt, adjust seasoning according to taste.
Transfer the mixture onto baking paper-lined tray.
Once cooled slightly, cut into bite-sized pieces for serving.
